lines.speaker: Lady Carys Hefin
lines.text: At long last we are back in our city, our home. Here in the light of Seren, we can properly continue our path to enlightenment.

lines.speaker: Lady Carys Hefin
lines.text: We cleanse our minds in prayer, and hone our bodies through agility. You can join us if you like. Feel free to reflect at our altar, or take to the roofs on our agility course.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I might just do that, thanks.
